Axe of Lost Souls  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 30 Dmg Bonus: 142 AC: -5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10 WIS: -5 INT: -5
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
One of the best buy
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2003 at 4:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966418413
1 post
Seing a lot of overpriced stuff around i think this Axe is a great weapon up to mid 50's, this axe still one of the best affordable weapons in the game with a 30/40 ratio and a lot of good magic resist and +10 str! in fact i am using mine from like 10 levels now and i am almost lv 55, yes now i am looking for an upgrade but more for a change than for a real necessity, with 140 unbuffed str i hit usually up to 150+ and average 120-130, this axe done a great job for a lot of time.
If you are interessed on it i am selling mine for 3k on the seventh hammer server.

"Btw it's a RARE ITEM not uncommon very difficult to make it drop more like to win a lottery than a real chance and the price on it is very low IMO ;)".

Reelan
▲ Page top
damage cap
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2003 at 6:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755245886
103 posts
i saw a guy who said he hit for 100 at lvl 25.. whats the damage cap at 25? GG DUDE
▲ Page top
RE: damage cap
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2004 at 1:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260995292
57 posts
I dont have one of these. but my son has a Blackened acrylia Halbred , about the same ratio. And at 28 he was hitting for over 100 consistantly. So i dont know what the cap is but anyone hitting for 100 at 25 to 30 is kickin tail.

# Feb 16 2003 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768551941
78 posts
i picked this up today in the bazaar for my pally, and it is GREAT! hes currently lvl 25 and has a skill of 85 2hs. he is hitting for 50-80 and sometimes 100dmg! if you have the money to buy one and can use it, i highly suggest you do.

Was trading in bazaar and dude ask me to trade a Darkforge Breastplate for this axe,a mthril breastplate and a crystaline fang but judgng by what I read my level 9 warrior is one of the luckiest on the Karana server.I just wanted to say that this is an awesome weapon.

QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 10:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1650241838217
14 posts
My guild has been killing Black Reaver for Jade Axe needed for Ranger/Druid Epic.

We have gotten a Jade each trip but have never seen this drop.

Unless the fates are smiling this is far more rare than uncommon

nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 8:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759354322
9 posts
hi a guild guy gave me this and said i would do good. i was surprised at how i outtaunted everyone else. I am lvl 27 right now and yes i am a Shadowknight. i useually hit for 80-90 everynow and then i hit for 100+. it also looks cool
this is great by itself but add a haste item*i curently have a FBSS** and this thing kicks
i am satisfied with it and wont look to upgrade till round lvl 40-50.
IF U GET THIS and u can use it KEEP IT!!!!!!!
bye bye now...
^ ^
*

PS im a OGRE SK so i the wieght no matter much

Soulink Delecateone lvl 27 SK
on the Inny server

the main problem with this weapon is weight = fatigue

QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2002 at 8:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761666008
34 posts
yeah, but it also adds 10 str, which will make up for a bit of the weight, not sure if that will counteract all of the fatigue it will add tho... just to add, what would the Bonus Damage be on this weap for a level 40?

Ninaelyan Shadowsmith, Level 40 DE Shadowknight

Edited, Mon Apr 29 21:06:56 2002
▲ Page top
RE: weight
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2002 at 7:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771380686
Scholar
29 posts
For a lvl 40 warrior the dmg bonus is 9. So if SK bonuses run the same then that is the bonus for ya.

Got One
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 10:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751003709
View User Forum
120 posts
I got this Axe last night, and while its no promal velium battle axe it is a pretty awsome weapon. It has the same dmg/delay ratio as firy avenger, granted not as good of stats and no proc. Also its a pretty unique look on the tribunal server because the polyphenominal axe doesnt drop anymore and theres like 3 of them, jade reavers are use in epic quests, and the exe axe is junk. Pretty sweet weapon, if you get one and can use it its deffinatly worth hanging on to.
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 7:20 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761526283
82 posts
I saw one fellow in the east commons tunnel on terris-thule selling one for 12k and he still had problems trying to sell it for that price..a friend of mine almost traded him a silken whip of ensnaring and a glowing black sword but decided against using a 2hs weap becaues he had a wurmslayer (main) and glowing black sword (secondary).

price

The price is right people it sells for like 20k the pluses greatley out weigh the negatives this is a sweet weapon

# Apr 11 2001 at 10:27 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
aye it is a good weapon .never seen it myself and of course the price is not right because once something goes beyond the 50kpp it nearly always becomes a trade only as such money hardly is in the hands of one player.as it is most post 50s raid oriented players never bother to even keep more than 1kpp in bank as they can virtually trade for most things.
